description: Wire the distinct proceeded-unreviewed exit code + verify the composition root (#120), part 2 of 2 (the DAG SINK): add ExitCodes.ProceededUnreviewed = 5 (the next free value after EscalationsPending=4) and return it from RunCommand when the run recorded a proceeded-unreviewed decision (+ render the 'ran with N unreviewed waves' warning) — distinct from green (0), needs-human (2), and EscalationsPending (4). Carries the composition-root proof: the drive-the-real-CLI-run RunOutcomeWiringTests (task 08) authored red, now GREEN across all four facts (undelivered / exit-5 / N-unreviewed / no-forged-marker).
